title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 294.054 - Contents and form of work certificates
text:
294.054.  Contents and form of work certificates. — 1.  The work certificate shall show
  (1)  The age, sex, place and date of birth and place of residence of the child;
  (2)  The name and place of residence of the child's parent, guardian or custodian;
  (3)  The name and address of the employer; and
  (4)  The nature of the employment for which the work certificate is issued.
  2.  Work certificates authorizing the employment of a child during nonschool hours shall be of a form and color distinct from those authorizing full time employment.
(L. 1957 p. 525 § 8)
